message:
fix(analytics): validate GA_MEASUREMENT_ID to prevent script injection

The GA_MEASUREMENT_ID was interpolated directly into script content
without validation, causing "Invalid or unexpected token" errors if
the environment variable contained special characters.

Added strict regex validation (G-XXXXXXXXXX or UA-XXXXXXXX-X format)
matching the pattern used for GTM_ID in third-party-scripts.tsx.

If the ID fails validation, analytics is gracefully disabled rather
than injecting broken JavaScript that crashes the page.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
